name: ice
description: Rule engine/process engine, committed to solving flexible and complex hard-coded problems, for complex/flexibly changing business, provide a new abstract orchestration solution that is lightweight, high-performance and provides visual operation pages. Java规则引擎-ice，针对复杂/灵活变动业务，提供一个新的抽象编排解决方案，轻量级，高性能并提供可视化操作页面
